testcase.name: Dual acceptance disabled when USDT_MINT is empty (devnet)
USDT mint is recognized as stablecoin
getAllowedMints for USDT returns both stablecoins when dual acceptance enabled
Null mint is not stablecoin (SOL payment)
Dual acceptance enabled when both mints are valid (mainnet)
getAllowedMints for USDC returns only USDC when dual acceptance disabled
Random token is not recognized as stablecoin
No warning when paid with expected stablecoin
getAllowedMints for random token returns only that token
getAllowedMints for USDC returns both stablecoins when dual acceptance enabled
Warning generated when paid with different stablecoin
SOL invoice should poll single wallet address
Mint not in allowedMints set should fail validation
Mint in allowedMints set should pass validation
actualMintUsed should be set when validation succeeds with different stablecoin
Stablecoin invoice should poll multiple ATAs when dual acceptance enabled
USDC mint is recognized as stablecoin
